## Privacy and security

<!-- Describe changes to files, Keychain, UserDefaults, logs, network requests, local processes, permissions, or provider prompts. Write "No change" when none apply. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and follows [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Tests cover new or changed behavior.
- [ ] User-facing setup and behavior are documented.
- [ ] Privacy and security documentation is updated when data handling changed.
- [ ] No credentials, private notes, personal paths, generated Xcode projects, runtime downloads, or build artifacts are included.
- [ ] New third-party code has compatible terms and updated notices.
